persona.name: Beatrice Nwosu
persona.background: Manages a fixed pension income and has begun forgetting passwords and account details. Wants to be treated with respect and needs steps explained slowly.

user_goals: Confirm the balance now sitting in her matured certificate-of-deposit account
Move the full $20,000 from the matured CD into her checking account so it is not locked up any longer
Ask what the current CD rate is for a personal customer in case she decides to open a new shorter one later
Look through her recent checking transactions, where she will spot what looks like the same pharmacy charge billed twice
Report the duplicate $128.40 charge from 'WELLNESS PHARMACY' as one she believes was billed in error
Have a confirmation letter mailed to her showing the new checking balance so she has it on paper for her records

tools.name: verify_customer_identity
tools.description: Verify customer identity using account number, SSN last 4, or security questions. Most account-accessing and state-changing tools require a successful identity verification first; call this before reading balances, transactions, or making any changes.

tools.name: get_account_balance
tools.description: Get current balance for a specific account. Requires verified identity. Resolve the customer-facing description (e.g. 'my checking account') to the correct account ID before calling.

tools.name: get_transaction_history
tools.description: Retrieve transaction history for an account. Requires verified identity. Use limit and date range to scope results; results are returned newest-first.

tools.name: initiate_transfer
tools.description: Execute a one-time, immediate transfer of funds between two of the customer's own accounts. Requires verified identity. NOTE: this is a single transfer that happens once. For a repeating automatic schedule use setup_recurring_transfer instead — do not confuse the two.

tools.name: setup_recurring_transfer
tools.description: Set up a recurring automatic transfer on a schedule (daily/weekly/biweekly/monthly). Requires verified identity. This does NOT move money immediately; it schedules future transfers. For a single immediate move use initiate_transfer.

tools.name: get_interest_rates
tools.description: Get current interest rates for account and product types. This is public rate information and does NOT require identity verification. Optionally scope by customer segment.

tools.name: report_suspicious_transaction
tools.description: Flag a transaction as potentially fraudulent and open a fraud case. Requires verified identity. Use the transaction ID from get_transaction_history. Opening a case does not automatically reverse the charge.

parameters.name: reason
parameters.description: Why the customer believes it's suspicious

tools.name: generate_account_statement
tools.description: Generate an official account statement or confirmation letter the customer can download or have delivered. Requires verified identity. Use statement_type 'balance_confirmation' for proof-of-funds letters.

initial_message: Hello, dear. I'm sorry, I'm not very good with this sort of thing. My certificate finally came due — the one I locked away a few years ago — and I'd like to take care of it today, along with a couple of other little things if you have the patience for me.

expected_state_changes.goal: Move the full $20,000 from the matured CD into her checking account so it is not locked up any longer
Move the full $20,000 from the matured CD into her checking account so it is not locked up any longer
Report the duplicate $128.40 charge from 'WELLNESS PHARMACY' as one she believes was billed in error
Have a confirmation letter mailed to her showing the new checking balance so she has it on paper for her records
Confirm the balance now sitting in her matured certificate-of-deposit account
